title: Verpine (language)
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}}
'''Verpine''' was the native language of the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] species from [[Roche asteroid field]].<ref name="u">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref>

Although Verpine language was usually spoken, Verpine could also use radio waves to communicate with other Verpine in their language.<ref name="u" />

Most Verpine were fluent in both Verpine language and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were only literate in their own language.<ref name="u" />

==Notable non-native speakers of Verpine language==
*[[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]]<ref name="g">[[Star Wars Gamer 10|''Star Wars Gamer'' 10]]</ref>
